problem: How to predict drug-receptor binding affinity from molecular structure without wet lab?
hypothesis: How to predict drug-receptor binding affinity from molecular structure without wet lab? remains unsolved because previous research missed the role of Reservoir. Reservoir computing with physical substrate directly addresses this.
